meta.title: Sync Lipsync 2.0 AI | Zero-Shot Lip Sync | OpenCreator
meta.description: Create natural lip sync videos with Sync Labs' Lipsync 2.0. Zero-shot model preserving speaker style across languages. Works with live-action, animation, and AI-generated content. Try on OpenCreator.

hero.description: Sync Lipsync 2.0 is a zero-shot model for generating realistic lip movements that match spoken audio. It preserves speaker style across languages and works with live-action, animation, and AI-generated characters.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Discover what makes Sync Lipsync 2.0 the world's most natural lip sync model

zeroShot.title: Zero-Shot Generation
zeroShot.description: No training or fine-tuning needed. Just drop in your video and audio—Lipsync 2.0 handles the rest instantly.

stylePreserve.title: Style Preservation
stylePreserve.description: The model picks up on how someone speaks by watching them. Even when translating across languages, it keeps their signature delivery.

crossDomain.title: Cross-Domain Support
crossDomain.description: Works with live-action humans, animated characters, and AI-generated faces with flawless results.

temperature.title: Temperature Control
temperature.description: Fine-tune how expressive the lipsync is. Make it subtle or dial it up depending on the scene.

activeSpeaker.title: Active Speaker Detection
activeSpeaker.description: Automatically detects who's speaking in multi-person videos and applies lipsync only when that person is talking.

editForever.title: Record Once, Edit Forever
editForever.description: Change dialogue after the fact while keeping the original speaker's delivery intact. No need for multiple takes.

gallery.title: See It In Action
gallery.subtitle: Real examples and use cases created with Sync Lipsync 2.0 on OpenCreator

dubbing.title: Video Dubbing
dubbing.useCase: Dub any video with AI while maintaining natural lip movements across languages.

postEdit.title: Post-Production Editing
postEdit.useCase: Change dialogue in post-production without re-recording. Edit words while preserving delivery.

animation.title: Animation Lip Sync
animation.useCase: Add realistic lip sync to stylized 3D characters and 2D animations.

aiAvatar.title: AI Avatar Videos
aiAvatar.useCase: Create hyperreal AI avatar videos with natural speech synchronization.

multiPerson.title: Multi-Person Videos
multiPerson.useCase: Handle multi-person videos with automatic speaker detection and targeted lip sync.

translation.title: Cross-Language Content
translation.useCase: Translate content across languages while preserving the speaker's unique style.

specs.title: Technical Specifications
specs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Sync Lipsync 2.0 capabilities

comparison.title: Model Comparison
comparison.subtitle: See how Sync Lipsync 2.0 compares to other lip sync models

pricing.subtitle: Pay only for what you use
pricing.note: Credits based on video duration. Subscribe to save more.

0.question: What is Sync Lipsync 2.0?
0.answer: Sync Lipsync 2.0 is a zero-shot model from Sync Labs for generating realistic lip movements that match spoken audio. It works out of the box without training and preserves a speaker's unique style across different languages and video types.

1.question: What makes Sync Lipsync 2.0 different from other lip sync models?
1.answer: Sync Lipsync 2.0 offers zero-shot generation (no training needed), style preservation across languages, cross-domain support (live-action, animation, AI), temperature control for expressiveness, and active speaker detection for multi-person videos.

2.question: What types of videos can I use with Sync Lipsync 2.0?
2.answer: Sync Lipsync 2.0 works with live-action footage, animated characters (2D and 3D), and AI-generated faces. It's suitable for dubbing, post-production editing, avatar videos, and cross-language content.

3.question: Does Sync Lipsync 2.0 preserve the speaker's style?
3.answer: Yes! The model picks up on how someone speaks by watching them. Even when translating across languages, it keeps their signature delivery intact.

4.question: Can I control how expressive the lip sync is?
4.answer: Yes, Sync Lipsync 2.0 includes temperature control that lets you fine-tune expressiveness. Make it subtle for professional content or dial it up for more animated scenes.

5.question: How much does Sync Lipsync 2.0 cost?
5.answer: Sync Lipsync 2.0 costs 60 credits per generation on OpenCreator. It's available on Canvas, Flow, and via API. Subscribers get additional discounts.
